author_guide_fields_desc:
template_id: Unique identifier for your template.
target_file: The exact name of the file this targets (e.g. mc_settings.cfg)
parser_type: The parser to use ("json" or "ini").
author_guide_intro: A workbench template maps an unstructured config file into a beautiful UI. Write your template in JSON on the right.
author_guide_settings_desc:
Define each UI control.
- key: The unique ID.
- path: The JSON path or INI key.
- type: "boolean", "number", "string".
- label_key: The display label.
- default: The fallback value.
author_mode_hint: Use the Template Author by selecting a .json file to create one.
author_rename_desc: The target config file to overwrite.
author_save_success: Template saved successfully to your workspace!
auto_all_mods_are_already_synced_no_unkn: All mods are already synced. No unknown mods found.
auto_analytics_and_escalated_intel_from_: Analytics and escalated intel from global Wayfinders.
auto_artifact_has_no_versions_synced_to_: Artifact has no versions synced to attach to a flavor group.
auto_artifact_not_found_in_your_registry: Artifact not found in your registry or missing DNA hash.
auto_cached_changes_from_your_last_sessi: cached changes from your last session.
auto_create_file_sub: Create a new file in your sandbox
auto_create_items_in_the_categories_arra: Create items in the `categories` array to structure the settings into beautiful UI tabs.
auto_dna_hash_is_required_to_create_a_ve: DNA hash is required to create a version entry
auto_e_g_load_mod_a_after_mod_b: e.g. Load Mod A after Mod B
auto_email_update_initiated_check_your_i: Email update initiated. Check your inboxes for confirmation links.
auto_error_database_blocked_the_action_r: Error: Database blocked the action! (Row-Level Security). You don't have permission to modify this comment.
auto_guest_mode_active_uploads_and_globa: Guest mode active. Uploads and global flags are disabled.
auto_mod_successfully_linked_to_existing: Mod successfully linked to existing record!
auto_no_tickets_found_in_this_category: NO TICKETS FOUND IN THIS CATEGORY.

critical_action: CRITICAL ACTION REQUIRED: Fatal conflicts require resolution before deployment
defcon_active_sub: VAULT LOCKDOWN ENGAGED ACROSS ALL CLIENTS
defcon_confirm_execute: Are you absolutely sure you want to broadcast a DEFCON 1 global alert? This will immediately lock down all connected clients and force emergency backups.
defcon_confirm_stand_down: Are you sure you want to stand down the global alert? This will lift the lockdown for all clients.
defcon_launch_intercept: Engine update detected. Forcing emergency backup before ignition. Proceed?
defcon_lonewolf_warning:
Engine patch detected.

You have 'Lone Wolf' mode enabled. Are you SURE you want to launch without backing up?
defcon_override_desc: Initiate a DEFCON 1 protocol. This will instantly force all connected Sanctuary OS clients to seal their vaults and trigger emergency backups. Use only during imminent game patch deployments.
defcon_prompt_already_backed_up:
You have already completed an emergency backup.

Are you sure you want to launch the game?
defcon_prompt_confirm_danger: Are you sure you want to proceed WITHOUT a backup?
defcon_prompt_intercept_launch:
A Game Patch is Active.

Would you like to run an emergency backup before launching?
defcon_prompt_patch_detected:
A game patch has been detected.

Would you like to run an emergency backup now?
defcon_sealing_desc: A surprise game patch is imminent. Sanctuary OS is currently sealing your vault and executing emergency backups to prevent Artifact corruption. Do not close Sanctuary OS.
defcon_sealing_desc_engine:
A Surprise Game Patch Is Imminent.
Sanctuary OS is Temporarily Locked While the Engine Core is Sealed.
defcon_sealing_desc_secured:
Emergency Backups Have Been Successfully Secured.
Sanctuary OS is now unlocked.
defcon_sealing_desc_world:
A Surprise Game Patch Is Imminent.
Sanctuary OS is Temporarily Locked While Your World State is Sealed.
defcon_stand_by_secured: BACKUPS SECURED. STANDING BY FOR LIFT OF LOCKDOWN.
defcon_warning: Initiating a DEFCON Override will immediately flag the Global Network status as LOCKED. All connected Sanctuary OS clients will automatically seal their vaults and run emergency backups to protect their loadouts against a surprise game update.
defcon_warning_red: Do not use unless an official game patch is actively rolling out.

empty_desc: Everything in The Nexus is already in Your Vault.

god_mode_warn: This protocol permanently severs your profile from the global network, granting you unrestrained local sandbox authority.
guide_desc: Define your UI using the settings array. Each object needs a key (matching the raw file), 	ype (boolean, number, string, dropdown), label_key, and category. Use the categories array to organize them into tabs.

landing_desc: Deploy the Conflict Radar to scan your active load order for fatal structural clashes, tuning data overlaps, and duplicate asset clones. Neutralize threats before they destabilize your environment.

lineage_timeline_desc: Chronological release timeline for this artifact
local_folder_desc: Group these artifacts locally. This does not affect the global database.
local_only_desc: Block external uploads/downloads. Strict offline mode.
malware_alert_description: Known malware signatures have been detected on your local system. To protect your files and ensure systemic integrity, the OS requires an immediate SECURE SHRED. This action will permanently overwrite the malicious data multiple times, making it unrecoverable by specialized software.
malware_alert_external_title: WARNING: The original infected payload is still in your system!
malware_alert_subtitle: Sanctuary OS has quarantined dangerous artifacts.
malware_override_desc: This will override the Malware Protocol. By doing this, you are actively permitting malicious signatures and unauthorized payloads to execute within your sandbox.
malware_severed_alert: You have chosen to override the Malware Protocol. Your Database Access has been severed.
malware_share_desc: Send your local quarantine manifests to Oversight for analysis and malware activity updates.
malware_share_desc2: All manifests are strickly metadata only and contain no personal or any identifying information.
malware_type_confirm: Type "I Confirm" to acknowledge the risks
malware_warning: WARNING: By overriding the Malware Protocol, you are willingly exposing the global network to known malicious DNA signatures. If you proceed, your Supabase JWT will be revoked and your hardware ID will be permanently blacklisted from Sanctuary OS global databases.
market_no_assets: You have not deployed any community assets.
